title: Chase the Skies
description: Sunrises and sunsets inspired by the promotional art for the 1.21.6 update, Chase the skies.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Chase the skies** is a resource pack inspired by the promotional art for the 1.21.6 update, "Chase the skies". It changes the day skybox, and adds better sunrises and sunsets.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d11c963fa39f91978fc8f975c9abf4935d1c8bc5.png)
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

Requires [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)


Possible thx to robot pants
